---
title: "HTML_JSON_practice"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Approach

\(1\) Identify 3 books and record the **title**, **authors**, and **two to three additional attributes** (e.g., publication year, publisher, ISBN, genre, rating). Make sure one book has multiple authors.

\(2\) Create the files in HTML and JSON in textedit and make sure they are similar if not identical in structure.

\(3\) Upload both files onto github.

\(4\) Load each data file separately into R and compare dataframes. (Trying to make them identical if possible).
